betterquesting:10.desc:8:
Fusion is used to make two lighter elements into a heavier one, a subtle nod towards real life (very accurate physics here trust me). While fusion recipes often have very high starting power requirements, they only consume the amount listed in JEI. As a result, you can run a fusion ring constantly off a single LuV amp (or ZPM amp for two recipes). 
Because fusion creates such a small amount at a time, it's generally best to passive your fusion rings and dedicate a new one to each new element you need.

This quest and fusion 2 and 3 are based on having 16 input and output hatches.
